title: The History of Don Quixote, Volume 2, Part 19
summaries: "The History of Don Quixote, Volume 2, Part 19" by Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra is part of a novel originally published in two parts in 1605 and 1615. The story follows Alonso Quijano, a nobleman who loses his sanity from reading too many chivalric romances and becomes the knight-errant Don Quixote. Accompanied by his earthy squire Sancho Panza, he embarks on adventures where fantasy collides with reality, mistaking windmills for giants and inns for castles, all while pursuing impossible ideals of chivalry. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
subjects: Spain -- Social life and customs -- 16th century -- Fiction
